section.heading: Termination of State participation
section.chapeau: The authority of a State to issue electronic stamps under this subchapter may be terminated—

paragraph.chapeau: by the Secretary, if the Secretary—

subparagraph.content: finds that the State has violated any of the terms of the application of the State approved by the Secretary under section 718q of this title; and
provides to the State written notice of the termination by not later than the date that is 30 days before the date of termination; or

paragraph.content: by the State, by providing written notice to the Secretary by not later than the date that is 30 days before the termination date.
